keyword: how to check wasp subscriptions vodacom
pageTitle: How to check Vodacom WASP subscriptions
metaDescription: Check Vodacom WASP subscriptions, find active premium services, and cancel unwanted billing before repeat charges keep taking airtime from your next top-up.
h1: How to check WASP subscriptions Vodacom
quickAnswer: To stop WASP charges on Vodacom, check active subscriptions first, cancel the service through the provider or network route, and confirm that future deductions stop. This is a cancellation job, not a phone-settings problem.

causes.cause: A paid content service is active
causes.explanation: A click, pop-up, or old sign-up can leave a premium content service billing your line.

causes.cause: The cancellation did not finish properly
causes.explanation: Some services keep billing until the provider confirms the stop request.

causes.cause: A repeat deduction is still pending
causes.explanation: One last charge can appear before the cancellation fully closes.

vodacom: Open the network app or self-service area and review active subscriptions on the line.
Cancel every service you do not recognise and keep the confirmation message or screenshot.
If the service gives a STOP or cancel reply route, use it exactly as shown and save the response.
Check the next deduction window to make sure the charge does not come back.
Contact support and raise a dispute if the line keeps losing airtime after the cancellation request.

preventionTips: Keep proof of every cancellation request until deductions stop.
Avoid signing up through unknown SMS links or pop-ups.
Check active subscriptions after any new unexpected airtime loss.
Ask support about premium-content blocking if this has happened before.

faqs.question: What should you do first for How to check WASP subscriptions Vodacom?
faqs.answer: Start by checking active subscriptions, because that shows whether the line is still attached to a paid service.

faqs.question: Should you use a STOP message if the provider offers one?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use the provider's cancellation route and keep the confirmation in case deductions continue.

faqs.question: What if How to check WASP subscriptions Vodacom keeps coming back after you cancel?
faqs.answer: Escalate it to support with screenshots of the charge and the cancellation proof so the line can be checked properly.
